Gain no inherent bonuses from Attributes
127738561.zh:
无视属性需求
无法获得属性加成

2609288.en:
Regenerate 1 Life per second per 16 Life spent in the past 4 seconds
20% more Life Cost of Skills
2609288.zh:
在过去 4 秒内，每消耗 16 点生命，每秒回复 1 点生命
技能的生命消耗总增 20%

3883972731.en:
50% of Cold and Lightning Damage taken as Fire Damage
50% less Cold Resistance
50% less Lightning Resistance
3883972731.zh:
受到的冰霜和闪电伤害有 50% 视为火焰伤害
冰霜抗性总降 50%
闪电抗性总降 50%

3125467759.en:
Projectiles do one of the following at random:
• Fork an additional time
• Chain an additional time
• Chain from Terrain an additional time
• Cannot collide with targets
3125467759.zh:
投射物随机执行以下效果之一：
• 额外分叉一次
• 额外连锁一次
• 从地形额外连锁一次
• 无法与目标碰撞

593845252.en:
-25% to maximum Chance to Block Attack Damage
-25% to maximum Chance to Block Spell Damage
+2% Chance to Block Spell Damage for each 1% Overcapped Chance to Block Attack Damage
593845252.zh:
攻击伤害格挡率上限 -25%
法术伤害格挡率上限 -25%
法术伤害格挡率按照每 1% 超量的攻击伤害格挡率 +2%

769028047.en:
+10% to all Elemental Resistances and maximum Elemental Resistances while affected by a Non-Vaal Guard Skill
20% additional Physical Damage Reduction while affected by a Non-Vaal Guard Skill
20% more Damage taken if a Non-Vaal Guard Buff was lost Recently
769028047.zh:
受非瓦尔防卫技能影响时，+10% 所有元素抗性和元素抗性上限
受非瓦尔防卫技能影响时，获得 20% 额外物理伤害减免
若近期内失去非瓦尔防卫技能增益效果，则受到的伤害总增 20%

1837900603.en:
Storm and Plant Spells:
• deal 50% more damage
• cost 50% less
• have 75% less duration
1837900603.zh:
风暴和植物法术：
•造成的伤害总增 50%
• 消耗总降 50%
• 持续时间总降 75%
